g.text: FIG-12-05. Horizon Bank Payment Attack Tree
Solid arrows are attack-tree paths. Dotted arrows point to mitigation notes.
OR means any listed attack path may contribute to the root goal.
The T12-08 AND node means both child conditions are required for that path.
Excluded threats: T12-04 concerns attribution and evidence. T12-06 concerns excessive event-data exposure.
Neither directly achieves this attack tree's root goal.
